image.title: Terry Chen
image.description: Hi, this is Terry. I'm documenting my product ideas and learning notes in this blog. I'm interested in creating new user experiences through generative ai, focusing on synthesized content generation and actionable insight extraction.

item.title: Crowdlisten
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Accelerating primary market research by analyzing crowd discussions.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Microsoft
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Understanding what types of problems demand agentic solutions, how to build them, and pitfalls to avoid.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Northwestern (DTR)
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Improving and scaling self-regulation skill coaching through AI agent systems.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: Aibrary
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring knowledge representation and agentic AI for lifelong learning.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen

item.title: TikTok
item.author: Terry Chen (Terry Chen)
item.description: Exploring what it means to be creative amidst the wave of AI generated content.
item.dc:creator: Terry Chen
